collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (5 total Queries, 5 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `notifications`.`id`, `notifications`.`title`, `notifications`.`message`, `notifications`.`is_read`, `notifications`.`created_at`, `notifications`.`is_admin_only`, IFNULL(notifications.type, "system") as type, IFNULL(notifications.link, "") as link, IFNULL(admins.name, "System") as staff_name FROM `notifications` LEFT JOIN `admins` ON `admins`.`id` = `notifications`.`user_id` WHERE `notifications`.`is_admin_only` >= 0 ORDER BY `notifications`.`created_at` DESC LIMIT 10

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `notifications`.`id`, `notifications`.`title`, `notifications`.`message`, `notifications`.`is_read`, `notifications`.`created_at`, `notifications`.`is_admin_only`, IFNULL(notifications.type, "system") as type, IFNULL(notifications.link, "") as link, IFNULL(admins.name, "System") as staff_name FROM `notifications` LEFT JOIN `admins` ON `admins`.`id` = `notifications`.`user_id` WHERE `notifications`.`is_admin_only` >= 0 ORDER BY `notifications`.`created_at` DESC LIMIT 10
